subject: MY HAir!!
body:
Hellloooooo Jeffrey!  I wanted you to know I went in to the city
yesterday and had my hair highlighted with Kyle at Oscar Blandi!....and
i LOVE it.  I'm totally blond again (as I should be!)  I am heading to
South Beach with my girlfriend on Thurs. March 6th, can't wait.  So
being blond is important .
 
I will be working Mon, Tues, Wed. next week (March 3,4,5) and back in
the office on Tues. March 11th from my trip.  I look forward to SEEING
you.
 
Thank you again for all the wonderful things you do for me and my
family.
 
Love, Les 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
body_html:
Hellloooooo Jeffrey!  I wanted you to know I went in to the city yesterday and had my hair highlighted with Kyle at Oscar Blandi!....and i LOVE it.  I'm totally blond again (as I should be!)  I am heading to South Beach with my girlfriend on Thurs. March 6th, can't wait.  So being blond is important .
 
I will be working Mon, Tues, Wed. next week (March 3,4,5) and back in the office on Tues. March 11th from my trip.  I look forward to SEEING you.
 
Thank you again for all the wonderful things you do for me and my family.
 
Love, Les 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
